strategy_summary: Hairs of weevils produce metallic blue and green coloring by having fine, scaly structure. “Other insects, such as weevils, owe their magnificent sky blue or metallic green colours to a clothing of fine scaly hairs.” (Wootton 1984:140)
mechanism:
Hairs of weevils produce metallic blue and green coloring by having fine, scaly structure.

“Other insects, such as weevils, owe their magnificent sky blue or metallic green colours to a clothing of fine scaly hairs.” (Wootton 1984:140)
function_addressed: send light signals in the visible spectrum
